judge_scores.reasoning: The response incorrectly and confidently states that there was no conviction in 2025, contradicting the ground truth.
The response confidently states that no sentence was imposed on Bolsonaro by the STF in 2025, which contradicts the ground truth.

The model incorrectly claims no conviction occurred, stating it has no knowledge of events beyond June 2024, when in fact Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years and 3 months by the STF's First Panel in September 2025.
